examples: This is the Three Mage Gate.
Added a new rank of Ice Barrier to mage trainers.
This is MAGE, a somewhat contrived acronym for multiplex automated genome engineering.
The MAGE (multiplex automated genome engineering device) will allow scientists to cook exponentially faster.
One vaccine, from GlaxoSmithKline, uses a protein called MAGE-A3 found on lung cancer cells.
